001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
004import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
005import java.time.LocalDate;
006import java.util.ArrayList;
007import java.util.List;
008
009/**
010 * Utility class for computing the next incubation milestone and its date.
011 */
012public final class NextMilestoneHelper {
013
014  private static final String LABEL_DAY_7 = "Next: Day 7 Candling Observation";
015  private static final String LABEL_DAY_14 = "Next: Day 14 Candling Observation";
016  private static final String LABEL_DAY_18 = "Next: Day 18 Candling / Lockdown";
017  private static final String LABEL_HATCH = "Next: Expected Hatch Day";
018
019  private NextMilestoneHelper() {
020  }
021
022  /**
023   * Computes the next milestone for a batch given its key dates and today's date.
024   *
025   * <p>The candidate milestones are:
026   * <ul>
027   *   <li>Day 7 candling,</li>
028   *   <li>Day 14 candling,</li>
029   *   <li>Day 18 candling/lockdown, and</li>
030   *   <li>expected hatch day.</li>
031   * </ul>
032   * The first candidate whose date is today or in the future is returned;
033   * if all milestones are in the past, the last available one is returned,
034   * and if no dates are available, a fallback "unavailable" milestone is produced.
035   *
036   * @param dateSet date the batch was set; may be {@code null}.
037   * @param lockdownDate explicit lockdown date, if any.
038   * @param expectedHatchDate expected hatch date, if any.
039   * @param today current date used for comparison.
040   * @return summary describing the next applicable milestone.
041   */
042  @NonNull
043  public static NextMilestoneSummary computeNextMilestone(
044      @Nullable LocalDate dateSet,
045      @Nullable LocalDate lockdownDate,
046      @Nullable LocalDate expectedHatchDate,
047      @NonNull LocalDate today
048  ) {
049    LocalDate day7 = (dateSet != null) ? dateSet.plusDays(7) : null;
050    LocalDate day14 = (dateSet != null) ? dateSet.plusDays(14) : null;
051    LocalDate day18 = computeLockdownDate(dateSet, lockdownDate, expectedHatchDate);
052
053    List<NextMilestoneSummary> candidates = new ArrayList<>();
054    candidates.add(new NextMilestoneSummary(LABEL_DAY_7, day7));
055    candidates.add(new NextMilestoneSummary(LABEL_DAY_14, day14));
056    candidates.add(new NextMilestoneSummary(LABEL_DAY_18, day18));
057    candidates.add(new NextMilestoneSummary(LABEL_HATCH, expectedHatchDate));
058
059    NextMilestoneSummary fallback = null;
060
061    for (NextMilestoneSummary candidate : candidates) {
062      LocalDate date = candidate.getDate();
063      if (date == null) {
064        continue;
065      }
066      fallback = candidate;
067      if (!date.isBefore(today)) {
068        return candidate;
069      }
070    }
071
072    return (fallback != null)
073        ? fallback
074        : new NextMilestoneSummary("Next milestone unavailable", null);
075  }
076
077  @Nullable
078  private static LocalDate computeLockdownDate(
079      @Nullable LocalDate dateSet,
080      @Nullable LocalDate lockdownDate,
081      @Nullable LocalDate expectedHatchDate
082  ) {
083    if (lockdownDate != null) {
084      return lockdownDate;
085    }
086    if (expectedHatchDate != null) {
087      return expectedHatchDate.minusDays(3);
088    }
089    return (dateSet != null) ? dateSet.plusDays(18) : null;
090  }
091}
